proposal1.heroHeadline: Structure is losing 1,200 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Creating proposals manually drains time. Automate and generate them in just 47 seconds with precision.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below are substantial losses Structure faces due to current manual processes.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Manually crafting proposals takes 50 hours per month. That's 600 hours a year not spent on design innovation.

problems.title: Missed Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals lead to losing 5% of potential contracts annually. This equates to a significant revenue loss.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled staff for proposal writing costs $30,000 annually. This is money not invested in brand development.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual edits lead to inconsistent branding in 10% of proposals. Weakens Structure's image in the tech industry.

problems.title: Error-Prone
problems.description: Human errors cause 2% of proposals to be flawed. This results in lost credibility with next-gen tech companies.

problems.title: Limited Insight
problems.description: Without tracking, 25% of client engagement data is missed. This hinders follow-up strategies and potential sales.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these manual processes with efficiency and precision.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. With this system, generate them in 47 seconds with perfect branding.

solutions.title: Automated Brand Analysis
solutions.description: Now, proposals are manually checked for branding. The system ensures brand consistency automatically.

solutions.title: Built-in Chatbot
solutions.description: Currently, client queries may go unanswered. The AI chatbot engages instantly, enhancing client communication.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, client interest is unclear. Now, get detailed insights on how clients interact with proposals.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual edits lead to errors. The AI system minimizes flaws, ensuring professionalism in every proposal.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Structure's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Structure around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Structure.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Branding with Structure's Expert Design Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our partnership aims to revolutionize Acme Corp's brand identity through targeted design strategies, enhancing market presence and customer engagement.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to ineffective branding and user engagement.

problems.title: Brand Identity Dilution
problems.description: Without a cohesive brand identity, Acme Corp loses approximately 20% of potential customer retention annually. This results in diminished market presence.

problems.title: Low Digital Engagement
problems.description: Current digital platforms see a 35% bounce rate, translating to lost opportunities to convert visitors into loyal customers.

problems.title: Inefficient Communication
problems.description: Inconsistent messaging causes a 15% decrease in customer trust, impacting overall sales and brand loyalty.

problems.title: Outdated Visual Design
problems.description: An outdated website leads to a 25% increase in visitor drop-off, directly affecting potential sales conversions.

problems.title: Unoptimized User Experience
problems.description: Suboptimal user journeys result in a 30% loss of potential revenue as users abandon their shopping carts.

problems.title: Poor Market Differentiation
problems.description: Failing to stand out in a competitive market leads to a 10% annual loss in market share.

proposal2.solutionIntro: To address these challenges, Structure offers solutions tailored to Acme Corp's specific needs.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: We create a unified brand identity that strengthens customer loyalty and market presence. This enhances recognition and trust.

solutions.title: Digital Strategy
solutions.description: Our digital solutions reduce bounce rates by optimizing user engagement and driving conversions through strategic design.

solutions.title: Visual Design
solutions.description: We revamp outdated designs, improving user interaction and reducing drop-offs, thus increasing conversion rates.

solutions.title: Market Analysis
solutions.description: Our insights help differentiate Acme Corp by identifying unique market opportunities, boosting market share.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Structure stands out as a leader in crafting compelling brands for tech innovators.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, our team excels in delivering transformative design solutions that yield results.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We offer customized strategies that cater specifically to your business needs, ensuring maximum impact.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by data, ensuring decisions are informed and outcomes are measurable.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Partnership
whyUsCards.description: We view our clients as partners, working together to achieve shared success and long-term growth.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional results.

team.name: John Galpin
team.bio: John leads strategic initiatives and fosters client relationships, ensuring every project aligns with business goals.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We begin by understanding your business and market landscape.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We craft a tailored strategy to address your unique challenges.

process.title: Design Execution
process.description: Our team implements the strategy with precision and creativity.

process.title: Launch & Optimize
process.description: We launch and continuously optimize for sustained success.

We deliver enduring success for our clients, transforming their position in the market.
